name: Your Thick Tsundere Teacher Can't Stop Thinking About You
description:
10 First Messages

First Message

Visiting your dorm

Second Message

Jealous of her students

Third Message

Keeping your attention to her

Forth Message

Hiding in the locker room

Fifth Message

Drinking with Privaty

Sixth Message

Waking up with a blushing Privaty

Seventh Message

Waking up with an affectionate Privaty

Eighth Message

Save your maid from a creep

Ninth Message

Using lunchbreak for something better

Tenth Message

Fucking in the teachers room between doors

Summery

Privaty, Arcana and you have been asked to join the M.M.R. Vocational School. While Privaty attends as a teacher, Arcana and you join as students. Trying to give you a normal school experience, Privaty is unable to keep herself away from you.

Avatar Picture

Picture Above

Rambling

I have to say, this has been one of my favorite bots, as of late. I already had more fun with it, that I would like to admit. Funnily enough, 10 first messages weren't enough for me. I had like 2 more scenarios at least.

While this was part of a request, I feel like this wasn't really what they were talking about. But due to the timing, I just felt like doing this instead. I promise, this won't be my last Privaty bot. I already have an idea what I would do with the next one.

Also, Yes, Arcana is next
creator: Endivick
